title: Space Runaway Ideon
wikitext:
'''Space Runaway Ideon''' (伝説巨神イデオン) was a series that aired in May 8th, 1980, and created by the reknown ''Yoshiyuki Tomino''. Similar to [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]], there was a movie that provided an alternate ending to the TV Series and a recap movie. There were several [[Tributes to Other Shows in Neon Genesis Evangelion#Space_Runaway_Ideon|homages to Ideon]] in Evangelion and [[Hideaki Anno]] is said to see Ideon as an important influence.

[[Category:A to Z]]

chunks.content:
Article: Space Runaway Ideon
Space Runaway Ideon (伝説巨神イデオン) was a series that aired in May 8th, 1980, and created by the reknown Yoshiyuki Tomino. Similar to Neon Genesis Evangelion, there was a movie that provided an alternate ending to the TV Series and a recap movie. There were several homages to Ideon in Evangelion and Hideaki Anno is said to see Ideon as an important influence.
